*   **Miscellaneous issues**: The remaining percentage is 100% - 40% - 35% = 25%. Therefore, 25% of 20 tickets equals 5 tickets.

On this particular day, Alex resolved all file access tickets (8) and all data security tickets (7). For the miscellaneous category, Alex resolved only half, which is 2.5 tickets.
